core_mechanism: axiomatic uniqueness characterization — proving that a single aggregation/selection rule is the ONLY map satisfying a given minimal set of mutually independent, individually-necessary axioms (a representation/characterization theorem)
brief_reason: The abstract's whole result is that one rule 'is the only rule that satisfies' an enumerated list of properties and that 'all axioms are necessary', which is precisely a uniqueness-by-independent-axioms characterization theorem.
